description_long: This is a tall, freestanding Maybelline-branded retail display kiosk designed for showcasing and dispensing cosmetic products. The front face features multiple shelves and compartments, each holding various makeup items such as foundations, powders, and palettes, with clear product labeling and promotional graphics. The upper section displays a large printed sign with the Maybelline logo, product images, and marketing text, drawing attention to new releases. The sides are solid and slim, with the Maybelline logo vertically printed, and the back is plain and unadorned, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall or in an aisle. The structure appears to be made primarily of rigid plastic and lightweight metal, with some cardboard or acrylic elements for signage and product holders. The overall design is sleek, modern, and functional, optimized for high-traffic urban retail environments.
description: A tall, sleek Maybelline retail display kiosk with multiple shelves for cosmetics, prominent branding, and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all product shelves, promotional signage, and detailed branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and vertical Maybelline logo, with product shelves protruding slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no visible features or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with visible product shelves and vertical branding.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed at the top front and along the side panels, with visible text 'Maybelline' and promotional graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with integrated printed signage, no overhangs or decorative elements.
